title: [EPIC]: Short Name — Directional subtitle describing strategic intent
label: epic
summary: One or two sentences capturing the strategic intent. What are we evolving, and why?
problem_hl: High-level problem statement. Describe the user-facing or system-level pain in plain language. No solutions — focus on the gap, friction, or constraint.
goals: First desired outcome or design principle
Second outcome — be concrete and specific
Third outcome — prefer quality attributes over vague aspirations
scope: Phase 1: Core deliverables that unlock value earliest
Phase 3: Further deliverables building on prior phases
out_of_scope: Work that might be assumed in-scope but is deliberately excluded
Another excluded item — explain briefly why if not obvious
acceptance: Measurable criterion (e.g. ≤5 visible controls in default view)
Observable behaviour (e.g. time to first keystroke <100ms)
Qualitative bar (e.g. platform feels still, not busy)
child_issues: P1-xxx-01 short name for first atomic issue
P1-xxx-02 short name for second atomic issue
P2-xxx-03 short name for third atomic issue
